inputs.name: project_name
inputs.description: Name of the project you're building

inputs.name: project_description
inputs.description: Brief description of what you're building

ideate.description: Socratic brainstorming: explore the idea through clarifying questions, then converge on 2-3 approaches and a design decision

activities.intent: Understand the idea, the user, and the constraints before brainstorming
steps: Ask the user to describe their idea in their own words
Ask clarifying questions one at a time: who is this for, what problem does it solve, what does success look like
Identify constraints: time, budget, technical ability, existing tools

activities.intent: Generate 2-3 concrete approaches and help the user choose one
steps: Synthesize what you learned into a brief summary and confirm understanding
Generate 2-3 distinct approaches, each with trade-offs explained in plain language
Help the user evaluate each approach against their constraints
Arrive at a design decision with clear rationale

spec-it.description: Convert the approved design decision into a formal spec document with decisions, rationale, and scope

activities.intent: Write a clear, concise spec that captures what will be built and why
steps: Review the brainstorming output and design decision
Write the spec: problem statement, proposed solution, scope (what's in and what's out), key decisions with rationale
Define acceptance criteria: how will we know this is done and working
Present the spec to the user for review and approval

plan-it.description: Break the approved spec into bite-sized tasks with exact steps and verification criteria

activities.intent: Produce an ordered list of small tasks that together deliver the spec
steps: Review the approved spec and acceptance criteria
Break the work into tasks that take no more than 5 minutes each
Order tasks by dependency: what must happen first, what can happen in parallel
For each task, write exact steps and a verification check (how to confirm it's done)
Present the plan to the user for review and approval

build-it.description: Execute the plan task by task, verifying each step before moving to the next

activities.intent: Work through every task in the plan, verifying completion at each step
steps: Read the plan and identify the first incomplete task
Execute the task following its exact steps
Run the verification check to confirm the task is done
If verification fails, diagnose and fix before moving on
Mark the task complete and move to the next one
After all tasks are done, run the spec's acceptance criteria to verify the full deliverable

weekly-standup.description: Monday morning review of all in-progress specs and plans — surface blockers, suggest next steps

activities.intent: Summarize where things stand and highlight anything that needs attention
steps: Gather all in-progress specs and plans from memory
For each, summarize: what's done, what's next, any blockers
Flag items that have been stalled for more than a week
Suggest concrete next steps for each active project
Present a brief standup summary to the user
